package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotations() string {
    ruleID := "repository_or_service_packages_import_docs_or_generator_annotations"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Core business packages that depend on documentation-only tooling or generator-specific concerns."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
